DP.316.0000:
Welcome to Geonet, the high-tech
globe!\f
DP.316.0001: What would you like to do?
DP.316.0002:
Here, you may register the location
of where you live.\f
That information may be provided to
friends and strangers through\f
DS Wireless Communications or over
Nintendo WFC.\f
Would you like to register your
home’s location area?
DP.316.0003:
Please select the location in which
you live.
DP.316.0004:
Please select the area in which
you live.
DP.316.0005:
Once registered, you may not change
your registered location data.\f
Should this location be registered
as where you live?
DP.316.0014:
To display registered locations, line up
the cursor, and press the X Button.
